verdict: Instagram ads are generating cheap leads, but the pipeline is leaking — zero booked revenue this period.
diagnosis: You spent $2,116 for 9 leads at $5.05 each — well below industry norms — yet no opportunities closed to dollars.

signals.headline: 9 leads at $5.05 each
signals.detail: Cost per lead is far under the $104–$153 HVAC benchmark. The volume is the bigger concern, not the price.

signals.headline: $0 in pipeline value
signals.detail: Every opportunity sits in open status with zero dollar value attached. Either deals aren't being qualified or values aren't being logged.

signals.headline: 107 reviews, 5.0 average rating
signals.detail: Reputation is a real asset right now. Six new five-star reviews this period reinforce trust ahead of summer demand.

signals.headline: 24 call clicks from Google
signals.detail: Local profile is driving phone interest. Direction requests at 44 suggest people are finding you, but call volume stays modest.

signals.headline: 7.62% click-through rate on ads
signals.detail: Strong creative engagement on the AC summer ad. The hook works — the issue is downstream conversion to booked jobs.

benchmark.label: Benchmark
benchmark.subheader: Your lead cost beats the industry
benchmark.body: HVAC cost per lead averages $104 blended and $149 for non-branded search in January 2026. Your $5.05 from Instagram is exceptional — but watch quality, not just price.

seasonal.label: Seasonal
seasonal.body: Cost per click spikes in summer as cooling searches surge. Conversion rates climb when urgency rises, like heatwaves. Q2 is when ad budgets typically need to scale up.

competitor.label: Competitor
competitor.subheader: Private equity rollups raising bid costs
competitor.body: HVAC saw 149 mergers recently, up nearly 13% year-over-year. Private equity-backed competitors are willing to overpay for leads short-term to grab market share in your metro.

recommendations.title: Audit the lead-to-booking handoff this week
recommendations.detail: 78% of customers hire the first company that responds. With 9 leads and $0 booked, consider timing how fast Tonie and other leads got a callback.

recommendations.title: Test Google Local Services Ads alongside Instagram
recommendations.detail: Local Services Ads close at 18–32% for HVAC and charge per valid lead. Worth exploring as a complement to social, especially heading into summer cooling season.

recommendations.title: Add deal values to every opportunity in the CRM
recommendations.detail: Every open opportunity shows $0 value. Without dollars attached, you can't tell which lead source actually pays back. Consider a simple required field.
